title: Lice's Language Bridge
description: Displays dual language translations in inventory, JEI, REI and any interfaces.
body:
# Lice's Language Bridge

View item names in two languages simultaneously in Minecraft! Perfect for bilingual players and language learners.

## Features

- **Dual Language Tooltips** - See item names in both primary and secondary languages at the same time
- **Multiple Interfaces** - Works in inventory tooltips, JEI (Just Enough Items), and REI (Roughly Enough Items)
- **Highly Customizable** - Configure colors, text formatting, language order, and separator styles
- **Performance Optimized** - Built-in translation caching system to minimize performance impact

![Showcase do Lice's Language Bridge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b06f06e231c642ae06ae268a5faf9e57885ff642.jpeg)

## Supported Languages

- Portuguese (PT-BR, PT-PT)
- English (EN-US, EN-GB)
- Spanish (ES-ES, ES-MX, ES-AR)
- French (FR-FR, FR-CA)
- German (DE-DE)
- Italian (IT-IT)
- Japanese (JA-JP)
- Korean (KO-KR)
- Chinese (ZH-CN, ZH-TW)
- And many more!

## Configuration

Customize everything through the config file:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/cGAuF2-hOOc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



- **Secondary Language**
- **Text Color** - 16 Minecraft colors to choose from
- **Text Formatting** - Italic styling support
- **Separators** - Newline, parentheses, or brackets format


## JEI/REI Search
